# LitRPG Critic

> Editorial rankings and reviews for LitRPG and progression fantasy readers.

LitRPG Critic is an independent editorial site that publishes curated rankings, in-depth book reviews, new release coverage, and genre analysis for the LitRPG and progression fantasy community.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://litrpgcritic.com/
- Ranked Lists: https://litrpgcritic.com/lists/
- New Releases: https://litrpgcritic.com/new-releases/
- Blog & Reviews: https://litrpgcritic.com/blog/
- About: https://litrpgcritic.com/about/

## Data Sources

Rankings and reviews are based on data aggregated from LitRPGTools.com, which tracks ratings, reviews, and popularity across major book platforms including Amazon Kindle, Kindle Unlimited, Audible, and Royal Road.

## Related Sites

- LitRPGTools.com — Parent platform with comprehensive LitRPG database, tracking, and discovery tools
- HaremLitGuide.com — Sister editorial site covering harem fantasy fiction
- FantasyRanked.com — Sister editorial site covering broader fantasy subgenres
- Harem-Lit.com — Parent platform for harem fantasy discovery and tracking

## Publisher

Pivot Press Publishing — Independent publisher of LitRPG, progression fantasy, and harem fiction.

## Content Updates

New blog posts and reviews published weekly via automated editorial pipeline. Rankings updated regularly based on live data from LitRPGTools.com.
